name: V_rest sweep on t0022 DSGC channel testbed (deterministic)
short_description: Per-trial spike counts and peak voltages from a V_rest sweep (-90 to -20 mV in 10 mV steps) of the t0022 DSGC compartmental model under the standard 12-angle moving-bar protocol with deterministic per-dendrite E-I scheduling (1 trial per angle per V_rest, 96 trials total).
model_description: ModelDB 189347 DSGC compartmental model (Mazurek lab) ported in t0008 and modified in t0022 to expose deterministic per-dendrite E-I scheduling. The model uses HHst membrane (with leak reversal eleak_HHst) on the soma and pas membrane (with e_pas) on dendrites, plus deterministic glutamate/GABA stimulus pairs constructed by tasks/t0022_modify_dsgc_channel_testbed/code (library asset modeldb_189347_dsgc). The V_rest is shifted by overriding both h.v_init and the resting parameters of every HHst- and pas-bearing section before h.finitialize.
prediction_schema: Each row is one (V_rest, angle, trial) outcome. Columns: v_rest_mv (float, mV), trial (int, zero-based trial index per angle, always 0 for this deterministic sweep), direction_deg (int, motion direction in degrees, one of 0/30/60/90/120/150/180/210/240/270/300/330), spike_count (int, count of spikes during the simulation window), peak_mv (float, peak somatic membrane voltage in mV), firing_rate_hz (float, spike_count / 1.0 s simulation window).

files.description: Tidy CSV of per-trial outcomes for the 8 V_rest values x 12 directions x 1 trial = 96 trials.
